name: Terumasa Hino
abstract: Terumasa Hino (日野 皓正, Hino Terumasa; born October 25, 1942) is a Japanese jazz trumpeter. He is considered one of Japan's finest jazz musicians.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Duke Ellington and His Orchestra and the Terumasa Hino Sextet

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum
about_quotes.evidence: that band also included a fantastic trumpet player from Japan, Terumasa Hino... So these were all more experienced people than me. And to have that opportunity to play with them was really good
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Next is your first recording that you made for Japan, but in New York, with Terumasa Hino, by 1970, Journey to Air. ... We’re all in the studio together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
